## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/CI
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is commonMain-first where possible.
- [ ] Public API changes are intentional and documented.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed.
- [ ] Examples or screenshots were updated for UI changes.
- [ ] Tests or relevant builds were run.
- [ ] No generated outputs are included.
- [ ] No secrets or local paths are included.
- [ ] Affected platforms were considered: Android, Desktop/JVM, Web/Wasm, iOS.

## Verification

<!-- List commands run, screenshots reviewed, or checks skipped with reason. -->
